Blinded.summary: Cannot see. Attacks suffer disadvantage; attackers gain advantage against you.
Blinded.bg3Note: Ranged attacks capped at 10ft instead of full disadvantage at range.

Burning.summary: On fire. Take fire damage at start of each turn. Wet condition prevents and removes Burning.

effects.text: Fire damage at start of each turn

Burning.bg3Note: BG3-specific condition. Damage amount varies by source of ignition.

Charmed.summary: Magically charmed. Cannot attack or target the charmer with harmful abilities.

effects.text: Cannot attack or harm the charmer
Charmer has advantage on social checks vs you

Downed.summary: Incapacitated and prone. Making death saving throws each turn. Allies can revive.

effects.text: Incapacitated — cannot take actions, reactions, or move
Prone — melee attacks vs you (≤10ft) have advantage
Rolling death saving throws each turn

Downed.bg3Note: BG3 downed state; allies can spend an action to revive with 1 HP.

Encumbered.summary: Carrying over 80% of max capacity. Jump distance halved.
Encumbered.bg3Note: Triggers at >80% carry capacity. Threshold: 40 + (10 × STR score) × 0.8 kg.

Ensnared.summary: Entangled by roots or vines. Speed = 0. Disadvantage on DEX saves. Escape with STR check vs source DC.

effects.text: Escape: STR check vs source DC

Ensnared.bg3Note: BG3-specific. Duration and DC set by source ability or spell.

Enwebbed.summary: Caught in spider webs. Speed halved. Disadvantage on attacks and DEX saves. Escape via ally Help action or own bonus action. Fire damage removes webs.

effects.text: Escape: bonus action (self) or Help action (ally)

Enwebbed.bg3Note: BG3-specific. Applied by spider-type enemies and Web spell surfaces.

Fearful.summary: Like Frightened but stronger: must flee the source. No additional actions.

effects.text: Must use movement to flee the fear source

Fearful.bg3Note: BG3-specific variant of Frightened. Stronger — forced flight, no extra actions.

Frightened.summary: Cannot move at all. Cannot attack or target the source of fear.

effects.text: Cannot attack or target the fear source

Frightened.bg3Note: BG3: fully immobile. Standard 5e only prevents moving toward the source.

Grappled.bg3Note: BG3: only applied by specific NPCs (Tentacle, Shadow Creeper). Not a player action.

Heavily Encumbered.summary: Carrying over 93% of max capacity. Cannot jump or climb.

Invisible.summary: Cannot be seen. Your attacks have advantage; attacks vs you have disadvantage.

effects.text: Cannot be targeted by effects that require sight

Paralyzed.summary: Completely incapacitated. Auto-crit within 10ft. Auto-fail STR and DEX saves.

effects.text: Incapacitated — cannot take any actions, reactions, or bonus actions
Attacks within 10ft are automatic critical hits (BG3)
Auto-fail STR and DEX saving throws

Poisoned.summary: Poisoned. Disadvantage on attack rolls and ability checks.

Prone.summary: On the ground. Melee attackers within 10ft have advantage. Breaks concentration. Turn ends immediately.

effects.text: Concentration broken automatically — no CON save (BG3)
Turn ends immediately when knocked prone (BG3)
Must spend half movement to stand up

Prone.bg3Note: No ranged disadvantage vs you while prone (standard 5e has ranged disadv). Concentration breaks with no save.

Restrained.summary: Held in place. Speed 0, attacks suffer disadvantage, attackers gain advantage.

Silenced.summary: Cannot speak. Cannot cast spells with verbal components.

effects.text: Cannot cast spells with verbal components

Silenced.bg3Note: All spells have implicit verbal components in BG3. Exceptions: spells usable while Silenced (e.g., Subtle Spell metamagic).

Sleeping.summary: Unconscious and asleep. Same rules as Unconscious. Melee attackers within range auto-crit. Woken by damage or loud noise nearby.

effects.text: Incapacitated — cannot act, react, or move
Melee attacks from adjacent attackers: auto-crit

Sleeping.bg3Note: Duration depends on source (spell vs natural sleep).

Slowed.summary: Speed reduced by 15 ft / 4.5 m. Loses bonus action and reaction.
Slowed.bg3Note: Applied by spells, surfaces, or enemy abilities. Duration set by source.

Stunned.summary: Completely incapacitated. Auto-fail STR and DEX saves. Attackers have advantage.

effects.text: Incapacitated — cannot take actions, reactions, or bonus actions
Auto-fail STR and DEX saving throws

Turned.summary: Affected by Turn Undead or similar. Cannot willingly move toward the source.

effects.text: Cannot willingly move toward the source

Turned.bg3Note: BG3: dodging is disabled while Turned.

Wet.summary: Soaked in water. Fire resistance and blocks Burning, but vulnerable to lightning and cold.

effects.text: Immune to Burning condition while Wet
Vulnerable to lightning damage — doubled damage taken
Vulnerable to cold damage — doubled damage taken

Wet.bg3Note: BG3-specific condition. Mixed effect — beneficial against fire, dangerous against lightning/cold.
